title: DHANZIPAK 500 Disposable 7 inch Paper Plates (18cm) – Eco-Friendly White Paper Party Plates – Grease-Resistant, Recyclable & Compostable – Ideal for Parties, BBQs, Picnics, Catering & Everyday Use
features: ✅ Bulk Pack of 500 Plates – Get great value with 500 durable 7-inch white paper plates, perfect for parties, events, and daily convenience at home or in the office.
🌍 Eco-Friendly & Recyclable – Made from responsibly sourced paper, these plates are fully recyclable and compostable, making them a sustainable choice for the environment.
💪 Strong & Grease-Resistant – Designed to handle everything from hot food to oily snacks without soaking through. Perfect for burgers, chips, cakes, and more.
🎉 Ideal for All Occasions – Whether it’s a birthday party, wedding, BBQ, picnic, or catering event, these plates are a reliable choice for easy cleanup.
🧳 Compact & Convenient – Stackable, easy to store, and lightweight – perfect for travel, camping, or keeping in stock for unexpected gatherings.
description: Upgrade your event or kitchen with this value pack of 500 7-inch disposable paper plates, the ultimate choice for hassle-free entertaining. These sturdy, grease-resistant plates hold up to hot, cold, and oily foods without collapsing or leaking. Perfectly sized for snacks, sides, desserts, or smaller meals, they’re great for both personal and professional use. Whether you’re hosting a birthday party, wedding, BBQ, picnic, or corporate event, these plates make cleanup a breeze. Made from eco-conscious, biodegradable materials, they’re safe for the planet and fully recyclable after use. Say goodbye to plastic and foam – and switch to a compostable, durable, and stylish white paper plate that keeps your guests happy and your conscience clear. ✅ Trusted by caterers, event planners, and eco-conscious households across the UK.
